title: Connecticut Expands Mail Voting, Catching Up to Most Other States
summary:
The state had fallen far behind national norms by still requiring an excuse, but a new law just expanded mail voting. It goes counter to Trump’s attacks on the practice.

title: Stilta Closes $10.5 Million For Agentic AI Patent Litigation Platform
summary:
Stilta, an AI company focused on patent litigation and intelligence, announced $10.5 million in funding led by Andreessen Horowitz, with participation from Y Combinator and founders and operators from leading AI companies including Sana, Legora, OpenAI, Lovable, and Listen Labs.
The post Stilta Closes $10.5 Million For Agentic AI Patent Litigation Platform appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Foundation Raises $6.4 Million For Human Authority Hardware Platform And Passport Prime Launch
summary:
Foundation announced a $6.4 million funding round led by Fulgur Ventures with participation from Arche Capital as the company expands beyond Bitcoin self-custody into identity, AI agent authorization, and programmable security infrastructure. The company also announced the general availability of Passport Prime, its flagship security device, along with expanded access to the KeyOS developer platform.
The post Foundation Raises $6.4 Million For Human Authority Hardware Platform And Passport Prime Launch appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: TIST Media: India-Based Startup Raises Seed Funding Raised At About $5.9 Million Valuation
summary:
Mumbai-based creator economy startup TIST Media has raised seed funding at an approximate post-money valuation of $5.9 million. The round was led by Sthira Partners, although the financial details of the investment were not disclosed.
The post TIST Media: India-Based Startup Raises Seed Funding Raised At About $5.9 Million Valuation appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: TECO Acquiring Dynaciate In $50.8 Million Deal
summary:
TECO Electric & Machinery Co. announced it has signed an acquisition agreement with Malaysian engineering company Dynaciate Engineering Sdn. Bhd., marking a major step in the company’s expansion into Southeast Asia’s AI data center infrastructure and modular data center markets.
The post TECO Acquiring Dynaciate In $50.8 Million Deal appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Dime: Williamsburg Expansion Includes Acquisition Of Former Signature Bank Space
summary:
Dime Community Bancshares announced the expansion of its Williamsburg footprint through the signing of a lease for a prominent banking space formerly occupied by Signature Bank.
The post Dime: Williamsburg Expansion Includes Acquisition Of Former Signature Bank Space appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Star Citizen: $1 Billion Raised As Space Sim Remains In Early Access
summary:
Cloud Imperium Games’ massively ambitious space simulation game Star Citizen has officially surpassed $1 billion in funding, cementing its status as one of the most expensive and heavily crowdfunded video game projects ever created. According to Engadget, the game has now attracted funding from more than 6.5 million backers since its original Kickstarter campaign launched in 2012.
The post Star Citizen: $1 Billion Raised As Space Sim Remains In Early Access appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Anthropic Reportedly Raising Over $30 Billion At $900+ Billion Valuation
summary:
Anthropic is reportedly preparing to close a massive new funding round that could exceed $30 billion at a valuation above $900 billion, according to a Bloomberg report citing people familiar with the matter. The deal, which could close as soon as next week, would position Anthropic ahead of OpenAI as the world’s most valuable AI startup.
The post Anthropic Reportedly Raising Over $30 Billion At $900+ Billion Valuation appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Ziptrrip: HelloTravel Acquisition Expands Corporate Travel And MICE Ecosystem
summary:
Mumbai-based corporate travel and expense management platform Ziptrrip has acquired online travel marketplace HelloTravel in a move designed to expand its footprint across MICE, business leisure, and experiential travel segments. The acquisition marks the company’s first takeover since launch and reflects its broader ambition to build an integrated travel operating system for enterprises and travelers.
The post Ziptrrip: HelloTravel Acquisition Expands Corporate Travel And MICE Ecosystem appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Jardine Matheson: AUS$3.4 Billion Acquisition Of I-MED Radiology Network From Permira
summary:
Permira announced that the Permira Funds, acting through their UK platform, have agreed to sell I-MED Radiology Network to Jardine Matheson in a transaction valued at a total enterprise value of AUS$3.4 billion.
The post Jardine Matheson: AUS$3.4 Billion Acquisition Of I-MED Radiology Network From Permira appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Grundium Acquires AI Precision Pathology Software Provider Visiopharm
summary:
Grundium announced it has acquired Visiopharm to create an integrated precision pathology platform that combines digital slide scanning with AI-driven pathology software.
The post Grundium Acquires AI Precision Pathology Software Provider Visiopharm appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Tequipy: €3.06 Million Raised For Global IT Device Automation Platform
summary:
Tequipy announced that it has raised €3.06 million in funding led by Smedvig Ventures, with participation from Manta Ray and Unfold.vc. The company said the funding will support its next phase of growth as it expands beyond hardware lifecycle management into software, access, and security automation for enterprise IT teams.
The post Tequipy: €3.06 Million Raised For Global IT Device Automation Platform appeared first on Pulse 2.0.
